## Determinism check

khmerthings tools must be rule/algorithm/dictionary-based — same input
always produces the same output, with no ML/LLM inference at runtime.
Does your proposal fit that constraint?

- [ ] Yes, this can be implemented deterministically
- [ ] Not sure / need input
